chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 119 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 17.02.2025 Mr. Imran Ahmed Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Sarfraz Ali Abbasi, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for respondent states that serious office objections have been raised including that with respect to the territorial remit. Learned counsel further states that educational institution in-question is not amenable to writ jurisdiction and the same has been decided in numerous Division Bench judgments of this court. It is further added that the petition is essentially a suit for recovery of contractual dues and the same cannot be entertained in writ jurisdiction. In view of the foregoing, this petition is found to be misconceived hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
